svg.title: MediSight+ System Design
svg.desc: System design showing client tier, CDN, API gateway, microservices, data tier, ML tier, and observability stack

g.text: API gateway — AWS EC2 t3.micro · Nginx · systemd
slowapi 10 req/min · CORS locked · JWT RS256 · input sanitization · prompt injection guard
Service tier — FastAPI · Python 3.12 · Pydantic v2 · SQLAlchemy 2.0
ML + AI tier — LangGraph · LangChain · sentence-transformers
CMS ICD-10-CM FY2026 · CMS MPFS · HCPCS Level II · PubMed E-utilities API · Pinecone serverless

svg.text: Security: bcrypt · JWT RS256 · role-based access · admin-only user creation · immutable locked notes
scikit-learn 1.9 · scipy 1.18 · numpy 2.4 · pandas · huggingface-hub · safetensors
NVIDIA CUDA toolkit 13 · cuBLAS · cuDNN · triton 3.7 · NCCL · nvJitLink
